_comment: Full-stack Claude Code settings by MarsDevs (www.marsdevs.com)

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(package-lock\.json|yarn\.lock|pnpm-lock\.yaml|poetry\.lock|requirements\.lock|\.generated\.|\.g\.ts|/generated/|/migrations/|/node_modules/|/dist/|/build/|\.next/)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lock files, generated code, migrations, build output, or node_modules.'; exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(\.env$|\.env\.[^e]|credentials|secrets|.*\.pem|.*\.key)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not create or edit files containing secrets, credentials, or private keys.'; exit 1; fi

# TODO: Uncomment the formatter for your stack:
# npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"
# ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null
# gofmt -w "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"
echo '[hook] Configure your formatter in .claude/settings.json'
